software_item.name: triage-clinic-ui
software_item.description: React-based microfrontend for practitioners to review triage results, view clinical flags, search conditions, and access patient data within the clinic application
software_item.safety_class_rationale: Displays safety-critical triage results and clinical flags to practitioners who make care decisions. Incorrect display could lead to misdiagnosis or delayed treatment. However, it is not the sole determinant of harm - practitioners review and validate the information. Contains safety-critical clinic condition search module (Class C).

hazard_contributions.description: Triage result or clinical flag not displayed to practitioner
hazard_contributions.cause: API call to /api/triage/clinic/results/interview/{id} or /api/interviewer/clinic/v3/interviews/{id} fails silently or returns incomplete data that is not detected
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Practitioner unaware of critical clinical flags or triage recommendations, leading to inappropriate care decisions, delayed treatment, or missed urgent conditions

hazard_contributions.description: Clinical flag displayed with incorrect or misleading content
hazard_contributions.cause: Guidance data (flags) rendered without validation or sanitization, markdown rendering introduces display errors, or interview data mismatch causes wrong flag attribution
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Practitioner receives incorrect clinical information, leading to inappropriate treatment decisions or incorrect urgency assessment

hazard_contributions.description: Wrong patient data displayed in search or triage results
hazard_contributions.cause: Patient search query returns incorrect matches, race condition between patient selection and data fetch, or patient ID mapping error in API responses
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Practitioner views triage results for wrong patient, leading to treatment decisions based on incorrect patient information

hazard_contributions.description: Network error causes partial or incomplete data display without clear warning
hazard_contributions.cause: API timeout or network failure results in partial data being displayed, error reporting to user fails, or error is logged but not surfaced to practitioner UI
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Practitioner makes decisions based on incomplete information, believing they have full triage results

hazard_contributions.description: Incorrect condition selected in NLP-based assisted triage search
hazard_contributions.cause: NLP search returns irrelevant or incorrect condition matches, user selects wrong condition due to unclear labeling, or search filtering excludes relevant conditions incorrectly
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Practitioner initiates triage interview for wrong condition, leading to inappropriate questioning and potentially missed diagnosis

hazard_contributions.description: Triage urgency or level of care information not prominently displayed
hazard_contributions.cause: UI design does not emphasize critical urgency indicators, collapsible panels hide important information by default, or styling/theming issues reduce visibility
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Practitioner overlooks urgent triage recommendation, leading to delayed treatment for time-sensitive conditions

hazard_contributions.description: Component crashes or fails to render, leaving practitioner without triage data
hazard_contributions.cause: Unhandled exception in React component lifecycle, null/undefined data not handled defensively, or incompatible data structure from API causes rendering failure
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Practitioner unable to access triage results, must rely solely on patient interview without system support, potential for missed diagnoses

hazard_contributions.description: Guardian selection error assigns triage results to wrong responsible user
hazard_contributions.cause: Guardian list not validated before selection, default guardian selected without explicit user confirmation, or guardian ID mapping error
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Triage results or care actions attributed to wrong guardian, potential consent and liability issues

hazard_contributions.description: Stale or cached triage data displayed after data has been updated
hazard_contributions.cause: React Query cache not invalidated after data updates, no polling or real-time updates for triage results, or AbortController cancels fresh data fetch leaving stale data visible
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Practitioner makes decisions based on outdated triage assessment that no longer reflects patient's current condition

hazard_contributions.description: Unauthorized access to patient triage data
hazard_contributions.cause: Component does not enforce access control checks, relies solely on backend authorization without client-side validation, or session expiry not detected before displaying sensitive data
hazard_contributions.potential_harm: Breach of patient confidentiality, unauthorized practitioner accesses sensitive triage results

risk_controls_implemented.description: Error handling with Promise.allSettled for parallel API calls
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: Uses Promise.allSettled to fetch multiple interviews and triage results, allowing partial success. Detects failures and reports to host application.
Components check for empty triageResults, null interviews, empty guidanceCollection before rendering. Returns null to prevent display of incomplete data.

risk_controls_implemented.description: Error boundary with error logging and rethrowing
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: ErrorHandlerProvider implements componentDidCatch to log runtime errors to analytics and rethrow to host application's error boundary for user-facing error screen.

verification_evidence.test_function: runtime errors test - should rethrow error from ErrorHandlerProvider ErrorBoundary

risk_controls_implemented.description: Axios interceptor for network error detection and logging
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: ErrorHandlerProvider adds axios response interceptor that detects timeout (408), network errors, and logs them to analytics with detailed context (URL, method, status).

verification_evidence.test_function: network error test - should send TRIAGE_CLINIC_REST_API error / TRIAGE_CLINIC_NETWORK error to analytics

risk_controls_implemented.description: Request cancellation via AbortController on component unmount
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: useEffect cleanup function calls controller.abort() to cancel in-flight requests when component unmounts, preventing state updates on unmounted components.

risk_controls_implemented.description: Debounced search queries to reduce API load and race conditions
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: useDebounce hook with 500ms delay prevents rapid API calls during user typing, reducing likelihood of race conditions and outdated results.

risk_controls_implemented.description: Explicit error reporting to host application
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: reportErrorToHost function provided via context, called when critical data fetching fails. Allows host application to display user-facing error messages.

verification_evidence.test_function: reportErrorToHost method in context - should provide children with reportErrorToHost method

risk_controls_implemented.description: Minimum query length validation for patient search
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: Patient search query requires minimum 3 characters (enabled: debouncedQuery.length >= 3) before triggering API call, reducing false matches.

risk_controls_implemented.description: Markdown rendering with sanitization via react-markdown
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: Uses react-markdown library to render guidance content, which sanitizes HTML by default and prevents XSS. Flags display textContent as markdown.

risk_controls_implemented.description: Filter out 'general' condition from NLP search results
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: NLP condition search explicitly filters out 'general' condition ID to prevent selection of non-specific condition that could lead to inappropriate triage.

risk_controls_implemented.description: Guardian validation and default selection for minors
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: Checks canSeekCareForThemself, automatically sets userId for self-seekers, defaults to first guardian in list for minors when ENABLE_EQUAL_ACCESS_FOR_GUARDIANS is enabled.

risk_controls_implemented.description: Interview ID correlation for flag attribution
risk_controls_implemented.implementation: Each guidance flag is tagged with interviewId, verified against interviews collection before rendering. Guidance without matching interview is excluded.

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Backend API must validate data integrity before returning triage results
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Frontend cannot independently validate that triage result urgency/level of care matches the interview responses. This requires clinical logic in backend.

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Backend must enforce strict authorization checks on triage result and patient data endpoints
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Frontend receives data via configured axios from host application. Cannot implement independent authentication/authorization checks.

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Backend must provide data versioning or timestamps to prevent stale data issues
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Frontend cannot determine if cached data is stale without server-provided metadata (e.g., last modified timestamp, ETag).

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Practitioner training on interpretation of triage flags and urgency indicators
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Software displays information but cannot ensure practitioner correctly interprets urgency or acts appropriately.

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Clinical workflow procedures for handling incomplete or unavailable triage data
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: When data fetch fails, practitioners need clear procedures for how to proceed without system support.

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Patient identity verification procedure independent of software
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Software displays patient data based on search/selection, but cannot verify physical patient identity matches selected record.

risk_controls_required_upstream.description: System-level monitoring and alerting for API failures affecting triage UI
risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Frontend logs errors to analytics but cannot implement operational monitoring or alerting infrastructure.

failure_modes.name: React component unhandled exception
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Component crashes, ErrorBoundary catches and logs error, host application error boundary displays error screen
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Practitioner cannot view triage results for affected patient, must use alternative means to gather clinical information
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: ErrorHandlerProvider.componentDidCatch logs to analytics, host application error boundary displays error screen
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Manual page refresh by practitioner, or navigation to different patient

failure_modes.name: API timeout on triage result fetch
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Promise.allSettled returns rejected promise, error logged to analytics, error reported to host
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Triage panel shows no data or partial data, practitioner may not realize data is incomplete
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Axios interceptor detects 408 or timeout error code, logs to analytics with TRIAGE_CLINIC_REST_API type
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: No automatic retry implemented. Practitioner must manually refresh or navigate away and back

failure_modes.name: Network connectivity loss during data fetch
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Network error detected by axios interceptor, logged as TRIAGE_CLINIC_NETWORK error type
failure_modes.effect_on_system: UI may show stale data or empty state, error message may be displayed by host application
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Axios interceptor detects network error (no response received), logs to analytics
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: No automatic retry. Requires manual refresh when connectivity is restored

failure_modes.name: Incorrect patient selected from search results
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Correct patientId is passed to API based on user selection, but user selected wrong patient from list
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Triage results for wrong patient displayed, practitioner may make clinical decisions for wrong patient
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: No automatic detection - relies on practitioner visual verification of patient name and ID
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Practitioner must notice error and clear search to select correct patient

failure_modes.name: Ambiguous search results lead to wrong patient match
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Multiple patients with similar names returned by API, user interface shows all matches without sufficient disambiguation
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Practitioner selects wrong patient due to insufficient identifying information in dropdown
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: No automatic detection - relies on practitioner verification
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Practitioner must notice mismatch between expected and displayed patient data

failure_modes.name: Backend returns malformed triage result JSON
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Axios successfully fetches data but TypeScript interfaces don't match actual structure, leading to undefined values or rendering errors
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Component may fail to render, or display incomplete/incorrect data without clear error
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: May trigger runtime error caught by ErrorBoundary, or may silently display undefined/null values
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Error boundary displays error screen if rendering fails, otherwise practitioner sees incomplete data

failure_modes.name: Condition search returns irrelevant results
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: NLP search API returns conditions that don't match practitioner intent, but component displays all results from API
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Practitioner may select incorrect condition for assisted triage, leading to inappropriate interview questions
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: No automatic detection - relies on practitioner judgment to select appropriate condition
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Practitioner must clear selection and search again with different query

failure_modes.name: Critical urgency flag not visually prominent
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Flags rendered with equal visual weight regardless of urgency, collapsed panel hides flags by default
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Practitioner overlooks critical urgency indicator, leading to delayed treatment for urgent conditions
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: No automatic detection - post-market surveillance via incident reporting
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Practitioner must actively expand panel and read all flags

failure_modes.name: Stale data displayed after cache invalidation failure
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Cache not invalidated after data update, useQuery returns stale data from cache instead of fetching fresh data
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Practitioner sees outdated triage results that no longer reflect patient's current state
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: No automatic detection - practitioner may notice timestamp mismatch or inconsistent data
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Manual page refresh forces cache invalidation and fresh data fetch

failure_modes.name: Component renders with null/undefined data due to race condition
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Component renders before async data fetch completes, null check prevents render but also prevents subsequent re-render
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Triage panel never displays even after data loads successfully
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Practitioner sees empty triage section, no error message displayed
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Manual page refresh or navigation away and back triggers new render cycle

failure_modes.name: Session expiry during triage result fetch
failure_modes.component: Axios HTTP client with clinic-core configuration
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: API returns 401 Unauthorized, axios interceptor may handle or pass through error
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Practitioner sees error or empty triage data, may not understand cause is session expiry
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Axios interceptor logs error (if not filtered), host application may detect and redirect to login
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: Practitioner must re-authenticate, then reload page to fetch data

failure_modes.name: Interview data mismatch causes flag misattribution
failure_modes.effect_on_software_item: Guidance flag has interviewId that doesn't match any interview in fetched interviews collection, flag is excluded from display
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Critical clinical flag not displayed to practitioner, potential for missed important information
failure_modes.detection_mechanism: Logic at line 62-64 silently excludes flag if interview not found, no error logged
failure_modes.recovery_mechanism: No automatic recovery - flag permanently hidden unless data fetch retried

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Primary source of triage results including urgency, level of care, clinical flags. Failure prevents display of critical clinical decision support.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Promise.allSettled catches failure, error logged to analytics, error reported to host, component renders empty/null
interfaces_with_safety_impact.timeout: Default axios timeout (inherited from clinic-core configuration)

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Provides interview metadata for correlating flags with source questionnaires. Failure prevents display of clinical flags.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Promise.allSettled catches failure, error logged and reported, component renders without flags

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Patient search results for identifying correct patient. Wrong results or failure could lead to viewing wrong patient's data.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: React Query handles error state, component sets hasError flag, no explicit error display in component
interfaces_with_safety_impact.retry_policy: React Query default retry policy (3 retries)

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: NLP-based condition search for assisted triage. Incorrect results could lead to inappropriate triage interview selection.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: React Query handles error state, component may display empty results or loading spinner

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Reports critical errors to host application for user-facing error messages. Failure to report means practitioner unaware of data fetch failures.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: No error handling on callback invocation - assumes host application handles errors

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Logs errors and events for post-market surveillance and operational monitoring. Failure prevents detection of systematic issues.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Axios interceptor excludes event-analytics endpoint from error logging to prevent infinite loop. No retry if logging fails.

interfaces_with_safety_impact.safety_impact: Provides configured axios instance with authentication and base URL. If returns null, all API calls fail.
interfaces_with_safety_impact.failure_handling: Components check for null configuredAxios and return early without rendering. No error message to user.

verification_gaps.description: Null/empty data checks in TriageResultPanels and GuidancePanel lack unit tests
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add unit tests verifying components return null when triageResults is empty, interviews is null, or guidanceCollection is empty. Test that no partial rendering occurs.

verification_gaps.description: AbortController cleanup in useEffect hooks not verified
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add tests verifying controller.abort() is called on component unmount and that in-flight requests are cancelled without causing state updates.

verification_gaps.description: Debounce behavior for patient and condition search not tested
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add integration tests verifying 500ms debounce prevents excessive API calls and that only final query after debounce is executed.

verification_gaps.description: No test for malformed JSON response from triage result API
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add test case where API returns 200 but with unexpected JSON structure. Verify error boundary catches rendering failures and error is logged.

verification_gaps.description: Interview ID correlation logic in useGuidanceItemsCollection not verified
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add unit tests verifying flags without matching interviews are excluded, and that flags with correct interviewId are included with proper tooltip messages.

verification_gaps.description: No test for partial failure in Promise.allSettled (some interviews succeed, some fail)
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add integration test where one interviewId succeeds and another fails. Verify error is reported but successful data is still displayed.

verification_gaps.description: No test coverage for minimum query length validation in patient search
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add test verifying API query is not triggered when query length < 3 characters, and that enabled flag correctly prevents premature queries.
Add security tests verifying react-markdown sanitizes HTML and prevents XSS when guidance content contains malicious markdown.

verification_gaps.description: NLP search filter for 'general' condition not tested
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add test verifying 'general' conditionId is filtered from results even if returned by API.

verification_gaps.description: No test for stale data scenario with React Query cache
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add test simulating cache not being invalidated after data update. Verify stale data behavior and document cache invalidation strategy.

verification_gaps.description: No test for session expiry / 401 response during triage data fetch
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add test case where API returns 401 Unauthorized. Verify error is logged and appropriate error state is set in components.

verification_gaps.description: Guardian default selection logic not verified for edge cases
verification_gaps.recommendation: Add tests for edge cases: empty guardian list, canSeekCareForThemself changing after initial load, ENABLE_EQUAL_ACCESS_FOR_GUARDIANS feature flag toggling.

cross_item_interfaces: API endpoints /api/triage/clinic/results/interview/{id} and /api/interviewer/clinic/v3/interviews/{id} connect to triage-engine and interviewer4 items
ErrorReporter callback connects to clinic-app host application
@platform24/clinic-core provides shared authentication and axios configuration
shared_hazards: Wrong patient data displayed (shared with any UI displaying patient information)
Network/timeout failures affecting data display (shared with all items using REST APIs)
Stale cached data (shared with any item using React Query or client-side caching)
Session expiry causing data access failures (shared across all authenticated items)
system_level_controls_needed: Coordinated cache invalidation strategy across all clinic UI microfrontends
Consistent error messaging and user guidance for network/timeout failures
System-wide monitoring dashboard for API failures affecting clinical workflows
Practitioner training on interpreting triage urgency levels and clinical flags
Standard operating procedures for when triage system is unavailable
Patient identity verification procedures independent of software search
